blended.narrative: Caberfae Peaks is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 55°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 3.7" of snow, highs of 45°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 4" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
